document.title: CRM Extension Catalog — Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2
document.description: Enriched catalog of all CRM pipeline, lead scoring, routing, fraud detection, agent rating, feedback, and monetized service extensions required for LAWIM_V2

extensions.current_limitation: No lead scoring exists in V2; no CRM pipeline or lead evaluation mechanism
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Lead entity with scoring engine module. Store base_score (Int), boosters_applied (JSON[]), penalties_applied (JSON[]), total_boost (Int), total_penalty (Int), final_score (Int) as computed fields on Lead. Score formula: final_score = max(0, min(150, base_score + sum(boosters) - sum(penalties))).
required_permissions: CRM: read lead (assigned agent, admin, manager)
CRM: update lead (assigned agent, admin, manager)
required_states: Lead.pipeline_stage ∈ {incoming, normalized, extracted, intent_detected, enriched, scored, classified, routed}

extensions.current_limitation: No score boosting mechanism in V2; no booster registry or detection logic
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement configurable booster registry with 13 boosters: budget_detected(+15), city_detected(+10), neighborhood_detected(+10), urgency_detected(+20), diaspora(+25), cash_purchase(+15), property_type_specified(+5), timeline_specified(+10), multiple_criteria(+10), professional(+15), referral(+10), complete_profile(+10), verified_phone(+10). Each booster has detection condition, value, and priority level. Boosters stored as JSON array on Lead.boosters_applied. Max total boost: not capped per-booster; final score capped at 150.
required_fields: Lead.boosters_applied: JSON[] [{type: String, value: Int, detected_at: DateTime}]
extensions.human_decision_question: Booster weights and detection criteria: Gold defaults (see CRM_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §3.2) or adjusted values per market segment

extensions.current_limitation: No score penalty mechanism in V2; no penalty registry or detection logic
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement configurable penalty registry with 8 penalties: missing_budget(-10), unclear_location(-10), spam_like(-50), too_short(-20), external_links(-30), duplicate_message(-20), aggressive_language(-30), impossible_request(-40). Each penalty has detection condition, value, and severity level. Penalties stored as JSON array on Lead.penalties_applied. Final score has minimum floor of 0 to prevent negative scores from cascading.
required_fields: Lead.penalties_applied: JSON[] [{type: String, value: Int, detected_at: DateTime}]
extensions.human_decision_question: Penalty weights and detection criteria: Gold defaults (see CRM_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §3.3) or adjusted values per market segment

extensions.current_limitation: No lead classification in V2; no threshold-based class assignment
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement classification module with 5 classes: HOT(80-150), WARM(60-79), COLD(40-59), LOW(20-39), SPAM(0-19). Configurable thresholds stored in CRM settings. Classification overrides: fraud layer 4 → SPAM; blocked user → SPAM; diaspora+investor >70 → HOT upgrade. Add classification enum field and sla_priority mapping (HOT=P0, WARM=P1, COLD=P2, LOW=P3, SPAM=quarantine).
extensions.human_decision_question: Classification thresholds for each class: Gold defaults (HOT 80-150, WARM 60-79, COLD 40-59, LOW 20-39, SPAM 0-19) or adjusted

extensions.current_limitation: No lead routing mechanism exists in V2; no agent zone assignment or lead capacity tracking
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 10: CRM Pipeline / Domain 12: Organization Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement routing engine with 4 methods: zone-based (city/neighborhood → agent zones[]), availability-based (lowest lead_capacity ratio), score-based (highest agent_rating), manual (admin assignment). Decision tree: zone match → availability → score → manual queue. Add zones[], max_leads, current_leads to OrganizationMember. Add lead_capacity, lead_count to Organization. SPAM leads never routed; sent to quarantine queue.
extensions.human_decision_question: Routing strategy: primary routing dimension (zone-based with availability fallback as specified in CRM_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §5.2) or alternative strategy

extensions.current_limitation: No multi-factor scoring in V2; current scoring is base + boosters - penalties without factor breakdown
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend scoring engine with 7-factor breakdown stored in metadata: budget_alignment (0-100), location_relevance (0-100), urgency_level (0-100), diaspora_proximity (0-100), cash_capacity (0-100), property_specificity (0-100), timeline_clarity (0-100). Each factor is computed independently and contributes to overall score. Factor data stored in JSON field Lead.score_factors (not replacing boosters/penalties). Factors used for routing insight and agent briefing, not for classification override.
required_fields: Lead.score_factors: JSON? (7-factor breakdown with per-factor scores)
required_permissions: CRM: read score factors (assigned agent, admin, manager)
extensions.human_decision_question: 7-factor scoring implementation: integrated into main scoring engine (with factor breakdown) or separate analytical module

extensions.current_limitation: No behavior tracking infrastructure in V2; no data collection points for user behavioral signals
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 10: CRM Pipeline / Domain 1: User/Role/Profile Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 8 behavior tracking dimensions: (1) message_history via Event audit trail (lead.* events), (2) response_time computed from first_response_at - created_at on Lead, (3) response_rate Float on User (messages responded / total received), (4) budget_changes JSON[] on Lead tracking {previous_min, previous_max, new_min, new_max, changed_at}, (5) visit_requests count derived from Event visit.requested, (6) visit_completion_rate Float on User (completed/requested), (7) negotiation_history JSON[] summary on User, (8) complaint_count Int + complaint_types[] String on User. Behavior data feeds into scoring and routing engine.
required_permissions: CRM: read behavior data (assigned agent, admin, manager)

extensions.current_limitation: No fraud detection in V2; no mechanism to detect broker spam, duplicate listings, fake prices, or suspicious urgency
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 4 fraud detection layers: Layer 1 (Broker spam) — same phone/email >5 leads in 1h → rate-limit 24h; Layer 2 (Duplicate listing) — same property details >2 accounts in 7d → merge investigation; Layer 3 (Fake price) — price >300% from market avg → require verification; Layer 4 (Suspicious urgency) — aggressive language + no details + external links → temporary suspension. Add is_fraud Boolean, fraud_layers_triggered String[], fraud_action_taken Enum to Lead. Fraud detection runs before scoring: Layers 1-2 halt pipeline; Layers 3-4 apply penalties/overrides.
required_permissions: CRM: read fraud flags (admin, manager, assigned agent)
required_states: Lead.fraud_action_taken = block → Lead creation blocked for sender
extensions.human_decision_question: Anti-fraud automation: automatic suspension for Layers 1, 2, 4 (as specified in CRM_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §6.2) or human-in-the-loop for all actions

extensions.current_limitation: No agent rating mechanism in V2; no post-interaction rating collection or agent_rating field
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement post-interaction rating workflow. Collection triggers: post-lead resolution (WhatsApp/Telegram, 1h), post-visit (WhatsApp/Telegram/Dashboard, 2h), post-transaction (Dashboard/Email, 24h), manual (Dashboard anytime). Rating scale 1-5 with labels (Poor→Excellent). Weighted average calculation: lead resolution feedback weight 1.0, post-visit weight 1.5, post-transaction weight 2.0, manual weight 1.0 with 50% decay after 90 days. Display: agent_rating Float rounded to 1 decimal on User profile. Used in score-based routing.
required_fields: User.agent_rating: Float (computed, 1.0-5.0, nullable for unrated agents)
User.total_ratings: Int (computed, count of ratings received)
required_permissions: CRM: rate agent (lead owner, project participant)
extensions.human_decision_question: Rating collection timing: all 4 triggers (lead resolution + visit + transaction + manual) as specified in CRM_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §9.2, or reduced set for MVP

extensions.current_limitation: No feedback handling in V2; Notification model exists but no structured feedback collection, aggregation, or reporting
extensions.proposed_structure: Create Feedback entity: id (UUID), lead_id (UUID?), user_id (UUID), agent_id (UUID?), organization_id (UUID?), feedback_type (Enum: rating|complaint|suggestion|compliment|report_issue), rating (Int 1-5?), category (Enum: service_quality|response_time|professionalism|accuracy|communication|technical|other), description (Text), status (Enum: submitted|acknowledged|in_review|resolved|escalated|closed), resolution_notes (Text?), resolved_by (UUID?), resolved_at (DateTime?), escalated_to (UUID?), is_public (Boolean), created_at (DateTime). Lifecycle: Submitted → Acknowledged → In Review → Resolved → Closed (with Escalated sub-path). Processing rules: auto-acknowledge within 5min; rating ≤2 auto-priority assign to admin within 1h; standard resolution SLA 48h (complaint 24h, escalated 4h). Aggregate feedback_score per agent/organization/platform.
required_permissions: CRM: read own feedback (feedback author user)
required_states: Feedback.status ∈ {submitted, acknowledged, in_review, resolved, escalated, closed}

extensions.current_limitation: No lead SLA concept in V2; no priority-based response time tracking or breach detection
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement SLA tracking per lead: P0 (< 30min, HOT), P1 (< 2h, WARM), P2 (< 24h, COLD), P3 (J+1 to J+7, LOW). Add sla_priority (Enum: p0|p1|p2|p3) and sla_deadline (DateTime) set on classification. sla_breached (Boolean) flag set when now > sla_deadline AND first_response_at IS NULL. Breach detection cron runs every 5 minutes. P0 breach: immediate re-route + admin alert; P1 breach: admin notification; P2/P3 breach: logged for reporting. SLA metrics tracked per agent: sla_breach_count, avg_response_time, sla_compliance_rate.
required_permissions: CRM: read SLA data (assigned agent, admin, manager)
extensions.human_decision_question: SLA thresholds: Gold defaults (P0 30min, P1 2h, P2 24h, P3 7d) as specified in CRM_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §8.1, or adjusted values

extensions.current_limitation: No lead purchase system exists in V2; no mechanism for agents to buy individual lead contacts
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement LeadPurchase model: id (UUID), agent_id (UUID references User), lead_id (UUID references Lead), service_order_id (UUID references ServiceOrder), pack_type (Enum: bronze|silver|gold|coordinate_unlock), credits_spent (Int), price_paid (Decimal), purchased_at (DateTime), contact_revealed (Boolean). Lead Bronze: 1 contact, 500 FCFA, 1 credit (if using credit system). LeadPurchase links to ServiceOrder for payment processing via Campay.
required_permissions: CRM: view purchased lead (purchasing agent, admin)
extensions.human_decision_question: Lead pricing: 500 FCFA default (Gold) per lead bronze, or market-adjusted pricing per region

extensions.current_limitation: No lead pack system exists in V2; no bulk lead purchase tiers
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend LeadPurchase with silver pack support: 5 contacts at 1,500 FCFA (300 FCFA/lead, 40% discount vs bronze). Implemented as same LeadPurchase model with pack_type='silver'. Credits spent: 3 credits. Links to ServiceOrder for payment. Silver pack deducts from available leads in bulk; each lead consumed independently.

extensions.current_limitation: No lead pack system exists in V2; no high-volume lead purchase tier
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend LeadPurchase with gold pack support: 15 contacts at 3,000 FCFA (200 FCFA/lead, 60% discount vs bronze). Implemented as same LeadPurchase model with pack_type='gold'. Credits spent: 6 credits. Gold pack provides best per-lead value and is recommended for active agents.

extensions.source_concept: Déblocage coordonnées propriétaire (Owner contact unlock, 500 FCFA)
extensions.current_limitation: No contact unlock mechanism in V2; owner contact details are either free or not accessible
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend LeadPurchase with coordinate_unlock pack_type: separate from lead purchase, allows agent to unlock property owner contact details for a specific property. Price: 500 FCFA (same as lead bronze but different mechanism). Implementation: distinct ServiceOrder type 'coordinate_unlock' + LeadPurchase with pack_type='coordinate_unlock' referencing property_id instead of lead_id. When purchased, owner phone/email revealed to agent.
required_permissions: CRM: view owner contact (purchasing agent only, 30d window)
extensions.human_decision_question: Distinction from lead purchase: same price (500 FCFA) but different mechanism — coordinate_unlock targets property owner contacts while lead purchase targets demandeur contacts. Confirm this distinction is correct for implementation.

extensions.current_limitation: No premium profile concept in V2; property seekers have no premium tier with priority features
extensions.proposed_structure: Add premium seeker profile as a ServiceOrder-based subscription. Premium features: priority matching, agent priority response, enhanced visibility to agents, advanced filtering. Price: 1,000 FCFA. Duration: 30 days. Field: User.is_premium_seeker (Boolean, default false), User.premium_seeker_expires_at (DateTime?). Linked to ServiceOrder for payment.
required_permissions: CRM: activate premium seeker (self-service via payment)
extensions.human_decision_question: Premium seeker features and pricing: 1,000 FCFA for 30 days with priority matching and agent response (Gold defaults). Confirm scope and pricing.

extensions.current_limitation: No diaspora service exists in V2 (feature_flag OFF); no verified property access for diaspora users
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement diaspora service tier 'diaspora_simple' as ServiceOrder: price 25,000 FCFA, category='crm', duration_days=90. Features: verified property access, dedicated agent, property listings curated for diaspora. Requires diaspora verification (foreign phone, international ID). Linked to Service → ServiceOrder → Payment flow via Campay.
required_fields: User.is_diaspora_served: Boolean? (linked to active diaspora service)
required_relations: ServiceOrder → Service: N:1 (diaspora service catalog entry)
extensions.human_decision_question: Diaspora service scope: Gold specifies 3 tiers (Simple 25k, Rapport 50k, Complet 75k). Confirm diaspora market as priority for LAWIM_V2.

extensions.current_limitation: No diaspora service exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Diaspora mid-tier 'diaspora_rapport': price 50,000 FCFA, includes all Simple features plus accompaniment and property reports (property valuation report, neighborhood analysis, investment memo). Duration: 90 days. Same implementation pattern as EXT-SVC-CRM-006 with tier='rapport'.

extensions.current_limitation: No diaspora service exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Diaspora premium tier 'diaspora_complet': price 75,000 FCFA, includes all Rapport features plus full accompaniment package (visit accompaniment, negotiation support, transaction assistance, legal referral). Duration: 180 days. End-to-end diaspora investment solution.

extensions.current_limitation: No subscription system exists in V2; no premium agent subscription tier with enhanced features
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 'agent_business' subscription as recurring ServiceOrder: 25,000 FCFA/month. Features: enhanced lead allocation (higher max_leads), priority routing, advanced CRM analytics, lead history export, multi-zone assignment. Linked to OrganizationMember for lead capacity upgrades. Duration: monthly billing via Campay. Agent must have active agent_business subscription for premium lead allocation.
extensions.human_decision_question: Agent Business features differentiation from Agent Pro (10,000 FCFA/month). Gold specifies Business at 25k/month with enhanced lead allocation. Confirm feature set and pricing.
